title: Federal Reserve Balance Sheet Developments
summary: This is a navigation/index page providing links to Federal Reserve balance sheet development reports, not an actual report itself. The page lists quarterly balance sheet reports from May 2022 through November 2025, with the most recent report dated November 2025.
key_points: This is a navigation page (listing page), not an archiveable content source — contains only links to balance sheet reports, not the reports themselves
Most recent balance sheet report listed is November 2025 (HTML | PDF)
Historical reports available from May 2022 through November 2025, plus references to older series back to 2009
Previous report in sequence was May 2025
Links to related resources: Quarterly Report on Federal Reserve Balance Sheet Developments and Monthly Report on Credit and Liquidity Programs
why_it_matters: This page serves as a gateway to Federal Reserve transparency reports on balance sheet management. However, the source itself provides no actual balance sheet data, numbers, or analysis — only metadata about available reports. Users must access individual PDF/HTML reports for substantive content.
macro_context: The Federal Reserve publishes balance sheet development reports quarterly as part of its commitment to transparency about monetary policy operations and financial stability. These reports cover trends in Fed assets (e.g., Treasury securities, mortgage-backed securities) and liabilities (e.g., reserves, reverse repurchase agreements).

issues_found: Source is explicitly a navigation/listing page per CORE RULE 6 - contains only links to reports, not substantive content
Source attribution URL field is blank/missing
No actual balance sheet data, numbers, or analysis present - only metadata about available reports
Record correctly identifies source_type as navigation_page but still includes why_it_matters and macro_context fields suggesting archival value
Cannot extract meaningful market structure or macro catalyst information from this source type

notes: Low-quality source for archival purposes — this is a landing page/index containing only hyperlinks to balance sheet reports, not the reports themselves. The actual Federal Reserve Balance Sheet Developments reports (e.g., the November 2025 edition) contain the substantive balance sheet data (asset composition, liability structure, reserve levels, RRP usage) that would be relevant for macro catalysts analysis. Recommend crawling individual report URLs directly rather than this index page. The November 2025 report at minimum should be accessed for current balance sheet context.
